description: Composition White churidar made of tussar cotton blended fabric, has waistband with drawstrings and tapered legs Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using mild detergent Dry in shade Do not soak This churidar from fabindia is crafted from a cotton-tussar blended fabric, designed to provide absolute comfort and perfect fit. Team it with long kurtas and sandals and you're all set to seize the day with a fab tradional look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
